chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.S-1252 of 2013 (Muhammad Shakeel vs. Commissioner for Workmen’s & another) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hg. of CMA No.9005/2024 19.05.2025 Syed Nadeem-ul-Haq, advocate for petitioner Mr. Sanaullah Noor Ghori, advocate for respondent ----- Learned counsel for petitioner has filed listed application for reduction of cost of Rs.20,000/- imposed upon the petitioner vide order dated 07.10.2024 for restoration of this petition dismissed in non-prosecution vide order dated 18.09.2017. Learned counsel submits that by mistake this petition was tagged with Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.229/2011 and dismissed in non-prosecution. According to him, actually the appeal was dismissed but since this file was tagged with the same, it was consigned to Record Branch and it took him two years to find out such facts and file the application for restoration; that his absence was not deliberate or intentional. Learned counsel for respondents has conceded to this fact. Accordingly, the amount of cost is hereby recalled, and the petition is restored simplicitor. Listed application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
